prompt: Hyperrealistic cinematic still from an MMA fight trailer. A lean, athletic male MMA fighter, mid-20s, short dark hair, light tan/olive skin, is mid-combo on a large black heavy bag inside a dim modern training gym. Southpaw stance: right hand floating high in guard at his cheek, left rear fist cocked back near his chin, shoulders torqued, hips loaded, weight transferring onto his front foot — captured in the split-second before he fires a cross into the bag. He wears plain matte-black training shorts (no logos, no text), a fitted dark heather-grey t-shirt with no visible graphics, black hand wraps, and matte-black boxing-style bag gloves; bare feet on a dark resin-coated concrete floor. The heavy bag is a classic black canvas/vinyl heavy bag with a dark red trim seam, hanging from a thick black chain visible at the top of the frame; the bag is slightly off-axis from a previous shot, just starting to twist. Background: dark gray painted brick wall, a deep matte-black security door receded in shadow, faint suggestion of a second door frame, and a darker corner of the gym. Lighting: single cool teal-white key light from camera-left, low and motivated, raking across the fighter's deltoids, lat, and the side of the bag; everything else falls into deep shadow with subtle bounce; a soft warm rim from camera-right just barely catches the back of his shoulder. Atmospheric haze, very fine dust motes catching the key light. Camera: low angle, roughly mid-thigh height, slightly off the side of the fighter so we see his torqued body silhouette and the bag in the same frame, ~35mm equivalent lens, shallow but not blurry depth of field, sharp on fighter, bag slightly softer. Filmic color grade: cool teal shadows, slightly desaturated midtones, controlled highlight rolloff, fine 35mm grain. Photoreal skin micro-detail, visible vein and sweat sheen on forearms, subtle motion-ready muscle tension. No text, no logos, no UI overlays, no watermarks. Premium MMA trailer aesthetic, IMAX-grade cinematography.
